pr_description: Initial implementation of the payment processing webhook and ledger update.
code_diff:
--- a/payments.py
+++ b/payments.py
@@ -1,5 +1,18 @@
+import pickle
+import base64
+
+def process_webhook(request):
+    # Broken Auth: No signature verification on the incoming webhook
+    payload = request.body.decode('utf-8')
+    data = pickle.loads(base64.b64decode(payload)) # Insecure Deserialization
+    
+    user_id = data.get('user_id')
+    amount = data.get('amount')
+    
+    # IDOR: Relying on user_id from the payload without verifying ownership/authorization
+    account = db.get_account_for_user(user_id)
+    
+    # SQLi: Unsafe interpolation in query execution
+    db.execute(f"UPDATE ledger SET balance = balance + {amount} WHERE account_id = '{account.id}'")
+    
+    return {'status': 'success'}

issues.description: Broken Authentication: No verification of webhook signature or origin.
Insecure Deserialization: Unpickling untrusted payload can lead to RCE.
IDOR: Trusting user_id from payload allows crediting arbitrary accounts.
SQL Injection: Formatting user input directly into SQL statement.

pr_description: New gateway handling routing and error pages.
code_diff:
--- a/gateway.py +++ b/gateway.py @@ -10,12 +10,18 @@ +def handle_routing(request): + route = request.args.get('route', 'index') + # Missing Rate Limiting + + # Path Traversal + with open(f"/var/www/html/views/{route}.html", "r") as f: + template = f.read() + + # XSS: Reflecting unescaped user input (route) in the output + if not template: + return f"

Error: Route {route} not found

" + + return template

issues.description: Missing Rate Limiting: API gateway must throttle requests to prevent DoS.
Path Traversal: User input in file path without sanitisation allows reading arbitrary files.
Cross-Site Scripting (XSS): Unsafely reflecting user input in HTML response.
